name: gcloud_storage
description: Upload, download, list, and manage files in Google Cloud Storage buckets

action.description: The Cloud Storage action to perform: list_buckets, create_bucket, list_objects, upload_object, download_object, delete_object, get_object_metadata

project_id.description: GCP project ID. If omitted, uses the default gcloud project.

bucket.description: GCS bucket name (without gs:// prefix). Required for most actions.

object_path.description: Object path within the bucket (e.g. 'data/file.csv'). Required for object operations.

content.description: Text content to upload (for upload_object action with inline content).

local_path.description: Local file path for upload/download operations.

prefix.description: Object name prefix for filtering list_objects results (e.g. 'data/').

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return for list operations (default: 100).

instructions:
Use this tool to interact with Google Cloud Storage. The user authenticates via their own gcloud CLI login.

**Available actions:**
- `list_buckets` — List all buckets in the project
- `create_bucket` — Create a new bucket (requires bucket name, optional location)
- `list_objects` — List objects in a bucket (optional prefix filter)
- `upload_object` — Upload content or a local file to a bucket
- `download_object` — Download an object to a local path or return its text content
- `delete_object` — Delete an object from a bucket
- `get_object_metadata` — Get metadata (size, type, updated) for an object

**Important:** Always check the user's allowed buckets in the package configuration before operating on a bucket. If no buckets are configured, ask the user which bucket to use.
